ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wine_samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wine sample */,
  "wine_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine type */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine producer */,
  "fixed_acidity" REAL /* Fixed acidity of the wine */,
  "volatile_acidity" REAL /* Volatile acidity of the wine */,
  "citric_acid" REAL /* Citric acid content in the wine */,
  "residual_sugar" REAL /* Residual sugar content in the wine */,
  "chlorides" REAL /* Chloride content in the wine */,
  "free_sulfur_dioxide" REAL /* Free sulfur dioxide content in the wine */,
  "total_sulfur_dioxide" REAL /* Total sulfur dioxide content in the wine */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the wine */,
  "pH" REAL /* pH level of the wine */,
  "sulphates" REAL /* Sulphate content in the wine */,
  "alcohol" REAL /* Alcohol content in the wine */,
  "harvest_year" INTEGER /* Year the grapes were harvested */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the wine was produced */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the wine was produced */,
  "bottling_date" TEXT /* Date when the wine was bottled */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Storage conditions of the wine */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wine_samples_wine_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_type_id") REFERENCES wine_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wine_samples_producer_id FOREIGN KEY ("producer_id") REFERENCES producers ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wine_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wine type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the wine type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the wine type */,
  "optimal_age" INTEGER /* Optimal age for the wine in years */,
  "serving_temperature" REAL /* Optimal serving temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "producers" (
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each producer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the producer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the producer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the producer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the producer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine sample being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the wine sample */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the wine sample was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES wine_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine sample */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes in this version */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_versions_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES wine_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine sample */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_files_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES wine_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine sample referenced */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier for the publication */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the publication has been cited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_publications_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES wine_samples ("sample_id")
)
